ACUTE_TMAX_TIMING.title: Acute study timing caveat
ACUTE_TMAX_TIMING.message: Acute studies may underrepresent peak enzyme activity — confirm timing of clinical pathology relative to expected Tmax. A single terminal timepoint captures only the snapshot at sacrifice, not the peak.

SMALL_N_ADVISORY.title: Small group size advisory
SMALL_N_ADVISORY.message: Studies with n < 5 per group have reduced statistical power. Certainty scores are explicitly discounted. At n = 2-3, output should be considered descriptive, not conclusive.

NON_GLP_STUDY.title: Non-GLP study
NON_GLP_STUDY.message: This study was conducted under non-GLP conditions. Results may have reduced regulatory weight. Data quality and documentation standards may differ from GLP studies.
